Influencer marketing platforms

A nurse on hour ten of her shift sells your protein bar better than any athlete. Gone are the days when mega creators moved the needle on conversion. Today people buy from who they trust: small, close-knit trusted communities. Trovio finds those communities, and their influencers who actually use and need your product. - Influencers matched on community in seconds - Post a brief, set terms, and we handle the rest - Full analytics and conversion tracking Trust converts. Reach doesn't. [...] Search struggles to find those people. A search bar retrieves creators by the label they filed themselves under, and your customers don't live in one label. They live in communities: comfy-clothes people, no-time-to-eat people, always-in-transit people. One community pulls from a dozen niches, so a lot of the best matches never show up when you type a keyword.

So we built the Brand Dashboard around communities instead:

 Tell us about your brand and we surface the communities your customers are already in, the influencers they trust, and the reason each one fits
 Post a brief, set terms, and manage every conversation, deliverable, and deadline in one place
 Track what actually matters: conversions, not just reach

We'd especially love your take on: [...] Overview

results.title: AI Marketing Team for US DTC Founders — Torvio | from $99/mo
results.content:
Most marketing AI tools are technically global but practically US-default. They get the calendar, the competitors, and the platform mix mostly right for American brands by accident. Torvio gets it right on purpose — and surfaces the moves your closest US competitors are making this week.

### The US retail calendar, not someone else's

Memorial Day weekend. 4th of July. Prime Day. Labor Day. BFCM week. Boxing Day. Super Bowl ad season. Valentine's. Mother's and Father's Day. Back-to-school. Torvio's morning briefings sequence campaigns against the dates American buyers actually shop on — not the UK Bank Holidays a UK-built tool would default to.

### US competitor intel that's actually current [...] 🇺🇸 Built for US DTC founders

# An AI marketing team that actually knows the US retail calendar.

Memorial Day. Prime Day. BFCM. Boxing Week. The DTC founders winning right now are not waiting for these dates — they are running 4 weeks ahead of them. Torvio's two AI agents brief you on what to do, when, and which competitors to beat.

Start 7-day free trial See how it works

Cancel anytime · $99/month after trial

Built for the brands competing in the largest DTC market

Allbirds-scale · Glossier-tier · Olipop-disruptor · Hims/Hers · Liquid Death

## Why the US market is different — and why generic AI tools miss it [...] ## The US retail calendar Torvio briefs against

A sample of the moments Kova and Jenny prepare you for. Every brand's specific calendar is customized to your product category and historical timing.

JAN — FEB

### New Year + Valentine's

Wellness brands win January. Gifting brands win Feb 1–14. Lead time: 4 weeks.

LATE MAY

### Memorial Day weekend

The first major US summer sale moment. Sun, swim, home, outdoor brands lead. Lead time: 3 weeks.

JUNE

### Father's Day + Pride

Gifting peaks late June. Pride campaigns require 6+ weeks of authentic creator lead time.

JULY

### Prime Day window

Even off-Amazon brands feel the gravitational pull. Either compete on price the same week, or sit it out deliberately. Decide early.

SEP

### Back-to-school + Labor Day

The lesson isn't "friction is bad." Friction in the right place absolutely works. The lesson is that the story I was telling myself about why users would value that pause was a story, not a finding. The customers and the data were telling me something different, and I had to listen. Onto the next thing the data is trying to tell us! [Likes: 18, Comments: 0]; Trovio (2mo): If you've ever opened a brand email and frozen because you don't know what to send back, this is for you. Most creators lose deals at the response, not the pitch. The brand reaches out. You think "I should send a media kit." You don't have one. You start making one in Canva. Three days pass. The brand has moved on. Pitch Kit fixes the thing in the middle. Media kit built from your real content in under a
